languages.text: {n}Контролируемые валы пламени выжигали километры корней, обращая их в пепел вместе с визжащими Погонщицами. Несколькими поселениями пришлось пожертвовать, но и множество жизней были спасены благодаря сноровистому плану Сестры Ардженты. Оставшиеся в живых Погонщицы уползли в свои логова зализывать раны.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Контролируемые валы пламени выжигали километры корней, обращая их в пепел вместе с визжащими Погонщицами. Несколькими поселениями пришлось пожертвовать, но и множество жизней были спасены благодаря сноровистому плану Сестры Ардженты. Оставшиеся в живых Погонщицы уползли в свои логова зализывать раны.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Controlled surges of fire scorched miles of roots, turning them to ash along with the shrieking Drovers. A few settlements had to be lost, yet countless lives were saved through Sister Argenta's astute plan. The surviving Drovers crawled back, to brood over their injuries in the dark of their lairs.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Контролируемые валы пламени выжигали километры корней, обращая их в пепел вместе с визжащими Погонщицами. Оставшиеся в живых Погонщицы уползли в свои логова зализывать раны.{/n}

The surviving Drovers crawled back, to brood over their injuries in the dark of their lairs.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kontrollü ateş dalgaları, çığlık atan Çobanlarla birlikte kilometrelerce uzunluğunda kökü yakarak küle çevirdi. Birkaç yerleşimden vazgeçmek zorunda kalındı ancak Rahibe Argenta'nın zekice planı sayesinde sayısız hayat kurtarıldı. Hayatta kalan Çobanlar, inlerinin karanlığında yaralarının acısını çekmek üzere geri süründü.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Controlled surges of fire scorched miles of roots, turning them to ash along with the shrieking Drovers. A few settlements had to be lost, yet countless lives were saved through Sister Argenta's astute plan. The surviving Drovers crawled back, to brood over their injuries in the dark of their lairs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kontrollü ateş dalgaları, çığlık atan Çobanlarla birlikte kilometrelerce uzunluğunda kökü yakarak küle çevirdi. Birkaç yerleşimden vazgeçmek zorunda kalındı ancak Rahibe Argenta'nın zekice planı sayesinde sayısız hayat kurtarıldı. Hayatta kalan Çobanlar, inlerinin karanlığında yaralarının acısını çekmek üzere geri süründü.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Des déflagrations ardentes contrôlées enflammèrent des kilomètres de racines, les réduisant en cendre avec les Chasseurs hurlants qu'elles abritaient. Quelques colonies furent perdues, mais d'innombrables vies furent ainsi sauvées grâce au plan judicieux de sœur Argenta, et les Chasseurs survivants se replièrent dans leurs antres ténébreux pour lécher leurs blessures.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Controlled surges of fire scorched miles of roots, turning them to ash along with the shrieking Drovers. A few settlements had to be lost, yet countless lives were saved through Sister Argenta's astute plan. The surviving Drovers crawled back, to brood over their injuries in the dark of their lairs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Des déflagrations ardentes contrôlées enflammèrent des kilomètres de racines, les réduisant en cendre avec les Chasseurs hurlants qu'elles abritaient. Quelques colonies furent perdues, mais d'innombrables vies furent ainsi sauvées grâce au plan judicieux de sœur Argenta, et les Chasseurs survivants se replièrent dans leurs antres ténébreux pour lécher leurs blessures.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Unas llamaradas controladas calcinaron miles de raíces, convirtiéndolas en ceniza junto con los Pastores y sus chillidos. Fue necesario sacrificar algunos asentamientos, pero el plan astuto de la hermana Argenta salvó innumerables vidas. Los Pastores supervivientes volvieron arrastrándose a sus oscuras guaridas para lamer sus heridas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Controlled surges of fire scorched miles of roots, turning them to ash along with the shrieking Drovers. A few settlements had to be lost, yet countless lives were saved through Sister Argenta's astute plan. The surviving Drovers crawled back, to brood over their injuries in the dark of their lairs.{/n}

languages.text: {n}可控的火势烧毁了绵延数里的根系，也将尖啸不止的拒生花一并烧成灰烬。虽然牺牲了几个定居点，但阿洁塔修女周密的谋划拯救了无数生命。幸存的拒生花爬回巢穴，在黑暗中恢复伤口。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Controlled surges of fire scorched miles of roots, turning them to ash along with the shrieking Drovers. A few settlements had to be lost, yet countless lives were saved through Sister Argenta's astute plan. The surviving Drovers crawled back, to brood over their injuries in the dark of their lairs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}可控的火势烧毁了绵延数里的根系，也将尖啸不止的拒生花一并烧成灰烬。虽然牺牲了几个定居点，但阿洁塔修女周密的谋划拯救了无数生命。幸存的拒生花爬回巢穴，在黑暗中恢复伤口。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kontrollierte Brände haben die Wurzeln und die kreischenden Treiber über Meilen hinweg zu Asche verbrannt. Einige Siedlungen mussten aufgegeben werden, aber zahllose Leben wurden durch Schwester Argentas listigen Plan gerettet. Die überlebenden Treiber zogen sich zurück, um in der Dunkelheit ihrer Verstecke ihre Wunden zu lecken.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Controlled surges of fire scorched miles of roots, turning them to ash along with the shrieking Drovers. A few settlements had to be lost, yet countless lives were saved through Sister Argenta's astute plan. The surviving Drovers crawled back, to brood over their injuries in the dark of their lairs.{/n}
